title: Missing Skopeo v1.22.0 on Quay
body: [Skopeo v1.22.0](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/releases/tag/v1.22.0) was released two weeks ago. However, no image has been pushed to [quay.io/skopeo/stable](https://quay.io/skopeo/stable). The latest tag on there is still `v1.21.0`. Is there a plan to upload the image?

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out. The `stable` images consume stable RPMs from Fedora, and per https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/?packages=skopeo there hasn’t been an update to 1.22 in the Fedora 43 release.

@lsm5 are we now frozen in F43? I do see the updates for F44+F45.
If we cannot wait until then, I could perhaps do a round of manual builds and accelerate updates for skopeo (but I'd prefer not to).

> with title `buildah-1.43.0-1.fc43, containers-common-0.67.0-1.fc43, & 2 more `

Oh, that’s why I missed that. Thanks.

> If we cannot wait until then, I could perhaps do a round of manual builds

I think this can wait. There are _very few_ changes since 1.21.0, and in short-term, we publish the “upstream” containers as well.

> The F43 update for skopeo 1.22 is at https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/FEDORA-2026-c623038804

This was pushed to stable just now, so a new skopeo container image will be available *soon-ish*

The [v1.22.0](https://quay.io/repository/skopeo/stable/manifest/sha256:45ba953b9fd686af45b7f251410c8e923775745aa969f3dba8b467d453d6c7ee) image is now on the Quay repository. I'll be closing this issue now.
